rationale: Fixed all 3 acknowledged failures: (1) test_directive_legs_match_h2_spec — stale USDJPY-short assertion updated to long; (2,3) test_state_paths_worktree.py x2 — cross-test pollution from test_path_authority_worktree_compat._import_path_authority_with_root mutating config.path_authority globals without restoration. Fix: helper now takes monkeypatch and uses setattr so mutations auto-restore.
